warnings: Pre-existing asset size warnings for editor.js and screen bundles

testPage.note: Existing test page retained; manual-selection variation with empty selectedPosts will now correctly show no carousel instead of falling back to automatic query

fixesApplied.description: Fixed manual selection with empty selectedPosts falling through to automatic query. Restructured the WP_Query conditional so that: (1) manual mode with selectedPosts runs a post__in query, (2) manual mode without selectedPosts skips the query entirely (sets $has_posts=false), (3) automatic mode runs the normal query with taxonomy filters. Initialized $query=null and $has_posts=false at the top, moved WP_Query construction inside each branch.

Added fallback aria-label='Content Carousel' on the section element when no heading is provided. In PHP, passed the aria-label string via the second argument of theme_block_props() when $heading is empty. In TSX, spread a conditional aria-label into useBlockProps() when attributes.heading is falsy. This ensures assistive technology users always have a section label.
Fixed CRLF line endings in DynamicContentCarousel.tsx and index.tsx via bun run lint:fix.
Fixed Prettier formatting (multiline function signature) in DynamicContentCarousel.tsx via bun run lint:fix.
Removed unused 'cn' import from DynamicContentCarousel.tsx (caught by eslint after lint:fix).
